articles.title: Frontispiece
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages from February 1925 (Vol. XII, No. 2) with advertisements for Blue Pine Olive Oil, Relief Society Magazine bound volumes, Temple and Burial Clothes, sacrament sets, and pepper/salt shakers. These are not from the October 1925 issue being searched for. No frontispiece content is visible in these images.
